title: Tax offset questions T3-T11
description: How to complete the tax offset questions T3 to T11 in your paper supplementary tax return.

child_links.title: T3 Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T3 if you made contributions to a complying superannuation fund or RSA on behalf of your spouse.

child_links.title: T4 Zone or overseas forces 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T4 if you want to claim a zone or overseas forces tax offset.

child_links.title: T5 Total net medical expenses for disability aids, attendant care or aged care 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T5 to claim a tax offset for medical expenses for disability aids, attendant care or aged care.

child_links.title: T6 Invalid and invalid carer 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T6 if you maintained a person who was 16 years or older and received particular government payments.

child_links.title: T7 Landcare and water facility 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T7 if you have an unused 'landcare and water facility' tax offset from a pervious year.

child_links.title: T8 Early stage venture capital limited partnership 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T8 to claim the early stage venture capital limited partnership tax offset.

child_links.title: T9 Early stage investor 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T9 to claim the early stage investor tax offset.

child_links.title: T10 Other non-refundable tax offsets 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T10 to claim other non-refundable tax offsets.

child_links.title: T11 Other refundable tax offsets 2018
child_links.description: Complete question T11 to claim other refundable tax offsets.

child_links.title: Total supplement tax offsets 2018
child_links.description: Complete the total supplement tax offsets section in your supplementary tax return.
